control_311.controlData: Your Plan Scorecard123

control_382.controlData: This metric represents the last attainment in the period per employee for All Companies, Your Peer Group and Your Company.

control_364.controlData: Target Variable Earnings Vs. Quota Amount

control_365.controlData: This metric represents the sum of the target variable earnings in the period divided by the total number of unique payees in the period compared to the sum of quota amount for each unique quota per payee divided by the count of all quotas.

control_366.title: Target Variable Earnings Vs. Quota Amount

control_387.controlData: This metric represents the count of each unique quota period divided by the count of all quota periods. The comparison data shows the difference between the YTD Quota Period for Your Peer Group and Your Company. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the quota period frequency by industry.

control_398.controlData:
{{quota_percent}}% {{highOrLow}}

Your employees are assigned {{highOrLow}} quotas than average.

control_353.controlData: This metric represents the sum of the unique quotas for each payee in the period divided by the total number of unique payees in the period. The comparison data shows the difference between Your Peer Group and Your Company. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average number of quotas per payee, as well as the average over time and by industry.

control_369.controlData: This metric represents the sum of quota amount for each unique quota per payee divided by the count of all quota quotas. The comparison data shows the difference between Your Peer Group and Your Company. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average quota amount, as well as the average over time and by industry.
